hooks.command: MEMORY=$(cat contracts/claude-session-memory.json | jq -c '{schemaVersion,contractId,lastUpdated,lastOptimized,currentState,versioningRules,deployFlow,gitPatterns,ciPatterns,commonPatterns,optimizations,corporateCIPipeline:{esteiraOverview:.corporateCIPipeline.esteiraOverview,monitoringProtocol:.corporateCIPipeline.monitoringProtocol,knownErrors:(.corporateCIPipeline.knownErrors|keys),autoFixProtocol:{steps:.corporateCIPipeline.autoFixProtocol.steps,rules:.corporateCIPipeline.autoFixProtocol.rules},autoEscalation:.corporateCIPipeline.autoEscalation,pipelineTimingGuide:.corporateCIPipeline.pipelineTimingGuide,deployHistory:.corporateCIPipeline.deployHistory},authArchitecture:{secrets:.authArchitecture.secrets,trustedCaller:.authArchitecture.trustedCaller},monitoringStack:{layers:.monitoringStack.layers},recentAudit:{date:.recentAudit.date,fixesApplied:.recentAudit.fixesApplied,skillsInventory:.recentAudit.skillsInventory},contextSeparation:{goldenRules:.contextSeparation.goldenRules},multiCompanyModel:{description:.multiCompanyModel.description,goldenRules:.multiCompanyModel.goldenRules,companies:{getronics:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.status,tokenSecret:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.tokenSecret,repos:.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repos,repoDetails:(.multiCompanyModel.companies.getronics.repoDetails|map_values({role,currentVersion,ci}))},cit:{workspaceId:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.workspaceId,status:.multiCompanyModel.companies.cit.status}}},workspaceSeparationAudit:.multiCompanyModel.workspaceSeparationAudit}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); PENDING=$(cat contracts/pending-tasks.json 2>/dev/null || echo '[]'); SYNC=$(cat state/community-resources-sync.json 2>/dev/null | jq -c '{lastSync:.lastSync,sources:.sources|map({name:.name,lastCommit:.lastCommit})}' 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"'"$MEMORY"'","pendingTasks":"'"$PENDING"'","communitySync":"'"$SYNC"'"}}'
hooks.statusMessage: Loading memory + pending tasks + community sync status...

hooks.command: bash scripts/claude/auto-save-memory.sh 2>/dev/null; echo '{"systemMessage":"CRITICAL: Before compacting, update contracts/claude-session-memory.json with ALL new decisions, patterns, errorRecovery entries, and lessons learned. This is MANDATORY — new information must NEVER be lost."}'
bash scripts/claude/auto-save-memory.sh 2>/dev/null || echo '{"systemMessage":"Auto-save failed — remember to commit session memory manually."}'

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); DANGEROUS=$(echo "$CMD" | grep -cE '(rm -rf|DROP TABLE|DELETE FROM|format [A-Z]:|mkfs|dd if=|chmod 777|curl.*\| *sh|wget.*\| *sh)' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$DANGEROUS" -gt 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Potentially destructive command detected. Review required."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git commit'; then bash scripts/claude/pre-commit-validate.sh 2>&1 | tail -20; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '(ws-socnew|ws-corp-1)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: ws-socnew and ws-corp-1 are third-party workspaces. Operation requires explicit owner authorization."}'; else echo '{"decision":"approve"}'; fi

CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.command // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo ""); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git (push|commit|merge)'; then TS=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ); echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"Audit: git operation at $TS\"}" ; fi
